description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:latest Docker image, a pip cache at .cache/pip and a virtualenv cache at venv/, and set PIP_CACHE_DIR to $CI_PROJECT_DIR/.cache. Define three jobs: a pages job in the deploy stage that runs pip install sphinx sphinx-rtd-theme, builds the documentation with make html in the doc directory, moves the output to public/, publishes the public/ directory as a pages artifact, and only runs on the master branch; a run job in the build stage that builds a wheel with python setup.py bdist_wheel, installs the resulting wheel with pip install dist/*, and stores the generated *.whl files as artifacts; and a test job in the test stage that runs python setup.py test, installs tox and flake8, and executes tox -e py36,flake8. All jobs inherit a before_script that prints the Python version, installs virtualenv, creates and activates a virtualenv.
